7.reason: [gets is unsafe and removed in C11; may cause compilation error in strict mode]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  [gets is unsafe and removed in C11; may cause compilation error in strict mode]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11. It can cause buffer overflow and leads to compilation errors or warnings with modern compilers. Use 'fgets' instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11. It can cause buffer overflow and leads to compilation errors with modern compilers that do not support it. Use 'fgets' instead.]
